extraction_reasoning: The litigation table contains one “By our Company” row, which is excluded, and one “Against our Company” row: criminal proceedings are Nil, tax proceedings are 7, statutory/regulatory proceedings are Nil, and other material proceedings are Nil. No subsidiary rows are disclosed, so the quantified amount against the company is ₹168.33 lakhs; the ₹181.17 lakhs in the “By our Company” row is excluded, giving ₹16.833 crore after conversion. The contingent-liabilities figure is the explicitly stated Total of ₹168.18 lakhs as at December 31, 2025, not a re-sum, equal to ₹1.6818 crore. Company-wide customer concentration for the most recent full fiscal year, Fiscal 2025, is stated as 86.05% for the top five customers and 95.68% for the top ten customers, both measured as a percentage of revenue from operations; the source tables use ₹ lakhs, converted to crore at 100 lakhs per crore.
